zh.Harrold, Bedfordshire, England, United K: 英國英格蘭貝德福爾哈洛爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Ralph de Morin, Knight於1225年出生在英國英格蘭貝德福爾哈洛爾德時，他的父親Sir Ralph de Morin36歲，母親Lady Albreda de Braose31歲。他至少有2個女兒。他去世於1255年在他的家鄉享年30歲。

zh-hans.Harrold, Bedfordshire, England, United K: 英国英格兰貝德福爾哈洛爾德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Ralph de Morin, Knight于1225年出生在英国英格兰貝德福爾哈洛爾德时，他的父亲Sir Ralph de Morin36岁，母亲Lady Albreda de Braose31岁。他至少有2个女儿。他去世于1255年在他的家乡享年30岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Morin,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Marcel, Lucien, Emile, Pierre, Andre, Normand, Gilles, Jacques, Fernand, Adrien, Gaetan.

French and Walloon: from a variant of the French personal name   Maurin  ; or a diminutive of   More   2, a nickname for a dark-skinned man. It is also found in England, as a surname of Huguenot origin. Compare   Moran  ,   Morang  ,   Morein  ,   Morong  ,   Morrin  , and   Morrow  .
Italian (northern): variant of   Morino  .

variants.name: Morain
meanings: Irish: altered form of Moran.
French: variant of   Morin  .

variants.name: Maurin
meanings: French: from a medieval personal name derived from the Latin name Maurinus, a derivative of Maurus ‘Moor’ (see Mauro ), which was the name of a 6th-century Christian martyr. This form of the surname is also found in Germany, Italy, and Slovenia (see below). Compare Morin .

Germanized or Americanized form of Slovenian Mavrin: from a personal name derived from the Latin name Maurinus (see above). In part, Maurin is a Gottscheerish (i.e. Gottschee German) surname, originating from the Kočevsko region in Lower Carniola, Slovenia (see Kocevar ).
Italian: rare variant of   Maurino  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Morneau
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Lucien, Adrien, Emile, Gaston, Gilles, Henri, Herve, Hilaire, Laurent, Napoleon.
French: shortened form of Morineau, derived from Morin , hence a double diminutive of More 2, a nickname for a dark-skinned man.

variants.name: Morang
meanings: Altered form of French   Morin  .

variants.name: Morein
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Donovan, Brigid.  Russian Vitaly, Gleb.
Altered form of French   Morin  . This surname is established in LA.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Móráin (see Moran ).

variants.name: Morong
meanings: Altered form of French   Morin  .

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Simon , now rare, but more common in the Middle Ages, when it gave rise to the surnames Simms and Simpson.

variants.name: Simon
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Ralph de Morin, Knight was born in 1225, in Harrold, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Ralph de Morin, was 36 and his mother, Lady Albreda de Braose, was 31. He had at least 2 daughters. He died in 1255, in his hometown, at the age of 30.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Ralph de Morin, Knight est né en 1225, à Harrold, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Ralph de Morin, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Lady Albreda de Braose, avait 31 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1255, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 30 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Ralph de Morin, Knight 1225 in Harrold, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Ralph de Morin 36 und seine Mutter Lady Albreda de Braose 31. Er hatte mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb 1255 im Alter von 30 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ralph de Morin, Knight è nato il nel 1225 nel Harrold, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Ralph de Morin, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Lady Albreda de Braose, aveva 31 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figlie. Morì nel 1255, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 30 anni.

ja.Harrold, Bedfordshire, England, United K: イギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアハーロルド
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph de Morin, Knightが1225年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアハーロルドで生まれた時，父Sir Ralph de Morinは36歳，母Lady Albreda de Braoseは31歳であった。彼は少なくとも2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1255年に故郷で30歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph de Morin, Knight(이)가 1225년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 해로드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Ralph de Morin(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Albreda de Braose(은)는 31세였다. 그는 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1255년 그의 고향에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Harrold, Bedfordshire, England, United K: Harrold, Beadafordscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ralph de Morin, Knight nasceu em 1225, em Harrold, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Ralph de Morin, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Lady Albreda de Braose, tinha 31 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1255, em sua cidade natal, com 30 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Ralph de Morin, Knight родился в 1225 г. в местности харролд, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Ralph de Morin было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Albreda de Braose, 31. У него было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер в 1255 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 30 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Ralph de Morin, Knight nació en 1225, en Harrold, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Ralph de Morin, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Lady Albreda de Braose, tenía 31 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió en 1255, en su pueblo, a la edad de 30 años.
